name: test_mtu
description:
arrange: set different MTUs on eth0 of one unit from each application.
    act: trigger reconfiguration and wait for active status.
    assert: verify wireguard interfaces on all units have the same MTU.
descriptionHtml:
arrange: set different MTUs on eth0 of one unit from each application.
act: trigger reconfiguration and wait for active status.
assert: verify wireguard interfaces on all units have the same MTU.
